# PERF-031 positive: defer used inside a hot request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-031-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Track(c *gin.Context) {
	defer trackLatency("Track")
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}

func trackLatency(name string) { _ = name }
